target.title: fix(agents): strip reasoning tags from chat replies
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89473.

- Treat `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` as reasoning-control tags in the shared final assistant text sanitizer.
- Align the embedded stream/block-reply tag matcher and message recompute trigger so chat-channel streaming delivery strips those tags too, including split opener fragments and attribute-bearing openers.
- Add focused sanitizer, `extractAssistantText`, and subscriber regressions for regular, namespaced, split, and attribute-bearing reasoning tags.

## Root Cause

The OpenAI-compatible stream partitioner already recognized `reasoning` tags, but the final sanitizer and embedded stream delivery matchers only covered think/thinking/thought variants. That left `<reasoning>...</reasoning>` text able to survive final assistant extraction or chat block-reply delivery. Split opener fragments could leak when the stream buffered only the older tag names, and attribute-bearing openers could still be missed by the embedded stream scanner even though the shared sanitizer accepted attributes.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Assistant-visible final text and embedded chat block-reply streaming now strip hidden `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` blocks through the same reasoning-tag taxonomy used for existing think/thinking tags, including when opening tags are split across stream chunks or carry attributes.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on this PR branch at `80122cae81`, running the source `extractAssistantText` path and real `subscribeEmbeddedAgentSession` block-reply subscriptions with `blockReplyBreak: "text_end"`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a local `pnpm exec tsx --eval` command that imported `src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts` and `src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts`, extracted assistant text from `Before <reasoning hidden="1">hidden draft</reasoning> After`, then streamed `<reasoning hidden="1">hidden stream` + `</reasoning>\n\nVisible reply` and `<antml:reasoning hidden="1">hidden stream` + `</antml:reasoning>\n\nVisible reply` through subscribed embedded sessions and collected `onBlockReply` output.

Evidence after fix: Console output from the direct run:

```json
{
  "extractAssistantText": "Before  After",
  "reasoningAttributeBlockReplies": [
    {
      "text": "Visible reply",
      "audioAsVoice": false,
      "replyToTag": false,
      "replyToCurrent": false
    }
  ],
  "antmlReasoningAttributeBlockReplies": [
    {
      "text": "Visible reply",
      "audioAsVoice": false,
      "replyToTag": false,
      "replyToCurrent": false
    }
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix: The hidden reasoning payloads were absent from extracted assistant text and from both attribute-bearing chat block replies. The only chat-visible block reply text was `Visible reply`.

What was not tested: Full repository suite, broad changed checks, GitHub CI beyond the checks GitHub ran for this PR, and live MiniMax/LiteLLM reproduction.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec tsx --eval '...'` direct extraction + subscriber attribute-bearing block-reply proof above
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 4 files / 202 tests passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.e2e-harness.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts` -> passed
- `git diff --check` -> passed
target.author: monkeyleet
